batch_basis: first 23 frozen pairs not present in the Wave 2 solo-triage selected-target pool; full-family statistical completion lane only
claim_boundary: Full-family remainder staging only; not selected-target evidence and not scored until a live Holo run exists.

required_holo_controls: pinned best artifact present after first admissible candidate
external solo and intra-Holo evidence separated
